introSection: Mine Express is a steel roller coaster located at Lihpao Land in Houli Hsiang, Taichung, Taiwan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Mine Express is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

fullText:
Mine Express is a steel roller coaster located at Lihpao Land in Houli Hsiang, Taichung, Taiwan.

Mine Express is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.
